WITH SegmentConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption,
        COUNT(DISTINCT y.CustomerID) AS CustomerCount
    FROM 
        yearmonth y
    JOIN 
        customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
AnnualAverages AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        TotalConsumption / CustomerCount AS AnnualAverage
    FROM 
        SegmentConsumption
),
OrderedAverages AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AnnualAverage,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY AnnualAverage) AS Rank
    FROM 
        AnnualAverages
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM OrderedAverages WHERE Rank = 1) - (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM OrderedAverages WHERE Rank = 2) AS SME_LAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM OrderedAverages WHERE Rank = 2) - (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM OrderedAverages WHERE Rank = 3) AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
    (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM OrderedAverages WHERE Rank = 1) - (SELECT AnnualAverage FROM OrderedAverages WHERE Rank = 3) AS KAM_SME_Difference;
	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH customer_id_cte AS (
    SELECT link_to_member
    FROM expense
    WHERE cost = 634.8 AND expense_date = '2012-08-25'
    LIMIT 1
),
yearly_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        e.link_to_member,
        SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(e.expense_date) = 2012 THEN e.cost ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(e.expense_date) = 2013 THEN e.cost ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM expense e
    JOIN customer_id_cte c ON e.link_to_member = c.link_to_member
    GROUP BY e.link_to_member
)

    (consumption_2012 - consumption_2013) / consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM yearly_consumption;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
